what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment (att-593c2721) of type board_items, linking it to a target board item (item-37876190) in the dragnet-development channel, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Target reference uses a board:// URI scheme
conventions: Uses a board:// URI to identify the target item
notes: A timestamped channel-attachment ledger entry that records a typed link to a board item in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or context does this attachment carry beyond the metadata fields?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment record and contains only attachment metadata; this matches its implicit purpose.
intention_signals: To persist a typed, timestamped reference between a channel attachment identifier and a specific board item for retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item, contributing a provenance/relationship fact to the channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file recording channel attachment att-593c2721 of type board_items targeting board item item-37876190 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To capture and persist a cross-reference from a channel attachment to a board item with a creation timestamp.
